Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 10/05/2025
The global ship recycling market continued to face headwinds, with limited momentum across key destinations. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The global ship recycling market continued to face headwinds, with limited momentum across key destinations. In India, the week began with marginal
positivity, hinting at a potential uptick in sentiment.
